role: This directory contains the CI/CD workflow definitions for the ArchSpine mirror system.
responsibility: Collectively, these workflows automate code linting, building, testing, packaging integrity checks, protocol asset validation, documentation build validation, smoke checks, and on-demand research test execution across multiple Node.js versions, ensuring continuous integration and release readiness.

children.role: Continuous Integration workflow for the ArchSpine mirror system
Automated workflow to execute the research test suite for the ArchSpine project on demand.
CI/CD pipeline configuration for the ArchSpine project
